description: A curated collection of foundational treaties, protocols, and regulations of the Southern African Development Community.

documents.title: SADC Treaty
documents.summary: The foundational treaty establishing the Southern African Development Community, aiming to promote regional integration, economic growth, and peace and security in southern Africa.

documents.title: Protocol on Trade in Services
documents.summary: Establishes a framework for the liberalization of trade in services within the SADC region, promoting cross-border service provision and economic integration.
documents.citation_format: SADC Protocol on Trade in Services (2012)

documents.title: Protocol on the SADC Tribunal
documents.summary: Establishes the SADC Tribunal, its jurisdiction, composition, and role in resolving disputes related to the interpretation and application of the SADC Treaty and its protocols.

documents.title: Protocol on Energy in the SADC Region
documents.summary: Establishes a framework for cooperation in the energy sector, promoting the development of renewable energy, energy efficiency, and regional energy security.

documents.title: Protocol on Mining in the SADC Region
documents.summary: Establishes a framework for cooperation in the mining sector, promoting sustainable mining practices, investment, and the development of mineral resources in the region.

documents.title: Protocol on Gender and Development
documents.summary: Establishes a framework for promoting gender equality, women's empowerment, and the integration of gender perspectives in all SADC policies and programs.
documents.citation_format: SADC Protocol on Gender and Development (2008)

documents.title: Protocol on Transport, Communications, and Meteorology
documents.summary: Establishes a framework for regional cooperation in transport, communications, and meteorology, promoting connectivity and infrastructure development across the SADC region.
documents.citation_format: SADC Protocol on Transport and Communications (2001)

documents.title: Protocol on the Facilitation of Movement of Persons
documents.summary: Establishes a framework for the facilitation of the movement of persons within the SADC region, promoting regional integration and cross-border mobility.
documents.citation_format: SADC Protocol on the Facilitation of Movement of Persons (2005)

documents.title: Protocol on Agriculture and Food Security
documents.summary: Establishes a framework for regional cooperation in agriculture, promoting food security, sustainable farming practices, and agricultural development in the SADC region.
documents.citation_format: SADC Protocol on Agriculture and Food Security (2014)

documents.title: SADC Tribunal: Mike Campbell v. Zimbabwe (2008)
documents.summary: A landmark judgment by the SADC Tribunal affirming the rights of citizens to access justice and protect their property rights, and establishing the Tribunal's jurisdiction over human rights violations.
